creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Host running 14-CURRENT ( FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT #17 master-n261438-cc0fe048ec3: Fri Mar 10 07:21:49 CET 2023 amd64). Upgrading or (after deletion) installing www/gohugo fails with the error shown below:

===>  Building hugo from .
go: finding module for package github.com/russross/blackfriday/v2
vendor/github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/v2/md2man/md2man.go:4:2: cannot query module due to -mod=vendor
*** Error code 1
